title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE LA PAZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, LAOAG CITY, TO EULALIO F. SIAZON MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. NO. 25739 / 88 OG No. 21, 3090 (May 25, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7358, April 08, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE LA PAZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, LAOAG CITY, TO EULALIO F. SIAZON MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the La Paz Elementary School situated in Barangay La Paz, Laoag City, is hereby changed to Eulalio F. Siazon Memorial Elementary School.

SEC. 2. The Department of Education, Culture and Sports is hereby directed to promulgate and issue rules for the implementation of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and December 11, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 8, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
